title: QUANTUM BEATS OF EXCITONS IN QUANTUM WELLS
author_string: LEO, KARL, SHAH, JAGDEEP, GÖBEL, ERNST O., DAMEN, THEODORE C., SCHMITT-RINK, STEFAN et al.
publisher: World Scientific Pub Co Pte Lt
abstract: We briefly review our recent observations of quantum beats of excitons in quantum wells. The quantum beats are observed as an oscillatory structure in the polarization decay of energetically closely spaced excitons which are coherently excited by ultrashort laser pulses.
